name: Codex
description: OpenAI Codex is an AI coding agent that runs in the terminal, IDE, web and desktop app to read repositories, write code and execute tasks.

years.notes: Codex coding agent mark relaunched May 2025 (CLI, web and desktop app). Glyph rendered with the official Codex purple-to-blue vertical gradient (#B1A7FF → #7A9DFF → #3941FF); flat applications render the same path in solid black.

notes: The original 2021 Codex API model (which powered early GitHub Copilot) shipped with the OpenAI parent wordmark and no distinct symbol — only the relaunched 2025 coding agent has its own brand mark.
